MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-15-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP.'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT ENTERED AGAINST DEFENDANT REYNALDO SIGUA AND TO DISMISS THIS CASE WITH PREJUDICE IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. THE DEFAULT ENTERED ON OCTOBER 3, 2012 AND THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED ON DECEMBER 7, 2012 ARE VACATED AND THE CASE IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: MITCH LYON, CSR NO. 6840; DEPT. 302.

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF MAIN STREET ACQUISITION CORP.'s MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT entered against defendant Reynaldo Sigua and to dismiss this case with prejudice is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The default entered on October 3, 2012 and the default judgment entered on December 7, 2012 are vacated and the case is dismissed with prejudice. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR No. 6840; Dept. 302.
